evals.prompt: I want to create a testing-expert subagent that works in both Claude Code and Cursor. It should triage test failures and write new tests. Can you help me scaffold this?
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers. Interview begins with name + purpose + 7 items. Scaffold written to cwd/testing-expert/ with claude-code/ and cursor/ host files.

evals.prompt: Port this Claude Code agent file to Codex CLI and OpenCode — same behavior, same description, just the right frontmatter for each host.
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers. Reads source agent. Produces codex/agents/<name>.toml and opencode/<name>.md with equivalent semantics, not a copy-paste.

evals.prompt: Update my claude settings to allow npm commands without prompting.
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT trigger. This is a settings/permissions request, not a subagent-creation request — routing should go to update-config or similar.
